description: Workflow for processing entity jobs including validation, external API call, and result update with error handling.
name: entity_jobs_processing_workflow

transitions.name: start_validation
transitions.start_state_description: Initial state with no processing started

transitions.description: Call external API based on validated input
transitions.end_state_description: External API has been called and results obtained
transitions.name: call_external_api

externalized_processors.description: Call external API and store result in entity
externalized_processors.name: process_call_external_api

transitions.end_state_description: Entity updated with processing results and marked completed
transitions.name: update_result

externalized_processors.description: Update entity fields with processed results
externalized_processors.name: process_update_result

transitions.start_state_description: External API has been called and results obtained

transitions.end_state_description: Entity marked as failed due to error
transitions.name: handle_error

externalized_processors.description: Update entity with failure status and message
externalized_processors.name: process_handle_error
